comments.body: So the “setup” step of the “cross” task now runs in 9:21, which is an improvement — but the Brew self-update (+ update of its environment, like Ruby) is still quite a few minutes which would be nice to avoid.

> still quite a few minutes which would be nice to avoid.

Ya, we've got very little control over that environment :disappointed: It's provided at no cost to us by Cirrus-CI, for which I'm very grateful.

Even getting past the $$$ hurdles of using our own MacStadium cloud setup, I'm afraid we'd just be thrown into months of debugging "Because Apple" problems.  Shoot, I even have a hard-time justifying time to add arm64 support via AWS, and that wouldn't involve twerking a weird bastardized-BSD environment...all standard Linux stuff.
